name: Occupational Personality Questionnaire OPQ32r
description: Broad workplace personality questionnaire measuring 32 behavioural dimensions including strategic thinking, influencing, leadership style and team fit. Used across roles for selection and development.

name: OPQ Universal Competency Report 2.0
description: Report format derived from an OPQ32r administration, mapping personality to a universal competency framework. An output, not a separate questionnaire.

name: OPQ Leadership Report
description: Leadership-focused report generated from OPQ32r results. Benchmarks candidates against leadership competencies for senior selection.

name: OPQ MQ Sales Report
description: Sales-specific report reading OPQ results in sales terms, optionally enriched with the Motivation Questionnaire (MQ) to reflect sales motivators and drives.

name: Sales Transformation 2.0 - Individual Contributor
description: Assesses how individual-contributor sales reps show up in a digital-first, modern selling model.

name: Global Skills Assessment
description: Self-reported skills assessment covering competencies and knowledge for talent audit and re-skilling initiatives.

name: Global Skills Development Report
description: Development report spanning ability, situational judgment, competencies, 360 and personality for re-skilling and growth planning.

name: SHL Verify Interactive G+
description: Adaptive general cognitive ability test covering inductive, numerical and deductive reasoning. Predicts learning speed and adaptability for technical and graduate roles.

name: SHL Verify Interactive – Numerical Reasoning
description: Interactive numerical reasoning ability test with simulation elements. Suited to finance, analyst and graduate numerical screening.

name: Graduate Scenarios
description: Situational judgment test calibrated for graduate-level candidates. Measures work-context decision making with no prior experience assumed.

name: Smart Interview Live Coding
description: Adaptive live-coding interview platform. Panels can frame language-specific tasks (including languages with no dedicated knowledge test) in real time.

name: Linux Programming (General)
description: Knowledge test on Linux systems programming, shell, and OS-level depth for backend and infrastructure engineers.

name: Networking and Implementation (New)
description: Knowledge test covering networking fundamentals and implementation for infrastructure and systems roles.

name: Core Java (Advanced Level) (New)
description: Advanced Core Java knowledge test covering concurrency, JVM internals, performance tuning and design-level Java for senior engineers extending production services.

name: Core Java (Entry Level) (New)
description: Entry-level Core Java knowledge test calibrated for graduate hires reading and modifying existing code.

name: Spring (New)
description: Knowledge test on the Spring framework, dependency injection, and REST/service design for Java backend engineers.

name: RESTful Web Services (New)
description: Knowledge test on REST API design principles, HTTP semantics and web-service implementation.

name: SQL (New)
description: Knowledge test on SQL querying, joins and relational database concepts.

name: Amazon Web Services (AWS) Development (New)
description: Knowledge test on AWS cloud development services, deployment and cloud-native patterns.

name: Docker (New)
description: Knowledge test on Docker containerisation, images, and container-based deployment for DevOps and cloud-native engineers.

name: MS Excel (New)
description: Knowledge test on Microsoft Excel concepts for quick conceptual screening of admin and office roles.

name: MS Word (New)
description: Knowledge test on Microsoft Word concepts for quick conceptual screening of admin and office roles.

name: Microsoft Excel 365 (New)
description: End-to-end Excel 365 simulation plus knowledge test capturing actual spreadsheet capability, not just conceptual understanding.

name: Microsoft Word 365 (New)
description: End-to-end Word 365 simulation plus knowledge test capturing hands-on document capability.

name: Microsoft Word 365 - Essentials (New)
description: Shorter Word 365 essentials simulation and knowledge test for core document tasks.

name: HIPAA (Security)
description: Knowledge test on HIPAA security provisions for healthcare staff handling protected patient information.

name: Medical Terminology (New)
description: Knowledge test on medical terminology for healthcare administrative and clinical-adjacent roles.

name: Dependability and Safety Instrument (DSI)
description: Standalone personality instrument measuring integrity, reliability, dependability and safety attitudes across sectors. Predicts rule compliance in safety-critical and trust-sensitive roles.

name: Manufac. & Indust. - Safety & Dependability 8.0
description: Sector-specific bundled safety and dependability personality solution with norms calibrated to manufacturing and industrial workforces.

name: Workplace Health and Safety (New)
description: Knowledge test on workplace health and safety principles and procedures.

name: SVAR Spoken English (US) (New)
description: Automated spoken English screen calibrated for a US accent. Assesses spoken language proficiency for contact centre and voice roles.

name: SVAR Spoken English (UK) (New)
description: Automated spoken English screen calibrated for a UK accent for contact centre and voice roles.

name: Contact Center Call Simulation (New)
description: Standalone newer simulation focused purely on the in-call contact-centre interaction. Suited to high-volume entry-level screening.

name: Entry Level Customer Serv - Retail & Contact Center
description: Behavioural and competency assessment for entry-level customer service roles in retail and contact centres.

name: Customer Service Phone Simulation
description: Older bundled customer-service solution combining biodata/situational judgment and simulation for finalist-stage depth.

name: Financial Accounting (New)
description: Knowledge test on financial accounting concepts for finance and analyst roles.

name: Basic Statistics (New)
description: Knowledge test on basic statistics for analyst, finance and data-adjacent roles.
